utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: 1) property: includes selected property with details (name, type, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, price, location, features) and price — fully specified. 2) financing: includes a financing solution with terms (solution type, LTV, down payment, amortization, rates) and costs — fully specified though some ranges/typical notes, but acceptable as terms and costs are present. 3) legal_services: includes service name, costs, and what's included — fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes package, costs, includes — fully specified. 5) setup_services: includes package, costs, includes — fully specified. 6) total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown with property price, financing costs itemized, legal and survey costs, moving, setup, and overall total estimate — fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered.
